standard: 도로의 구조·시설 기준에 관한 규칙 (+ 해설 Commentary)
notes: COMMENTARY (해설) retrieved: '도로의 구조·시설 기준에 관한 규칙 해설' final version dated 2021-12-13 (211213최종), issued by MOLIT (국토교통부), hosted on CODIL (건설기술정보시스템, the MOLIT Construction Technology Information System operated under MOLIT's 건설사업정보화사업 — official government body). 735 pages, validated ok=true. This commentary carries the actual geometric design values and embeds the rule text inline. Direct file URL: https://www.codil.or.kr/filebank/files/202308/helpdesk/BBS_202308161003209501.pdf?atchFileId=FILE_000000000009986&fileSn=1 . BARE RULE TEXT: the legal rule '도로의 구조·시설 기준에 관한 규칙' is freely viewable on law.go.kr (국가법령정보센터, e.g. https://www.law.go.kr/LSW/lsInfoP.do?lsiSeq=138166), but its PDF/HWP export requires an interactive authenticated session that curl could not replicate (download endpoints returned HTML or TLS failures). The rule text is effectively captured because the 해설 commentary quotes the full rule articles inline. MOLIT's own commentary page (molit.go.kr idx=17894) was unreachable via curl due to legacy TLS cipher rejection; CODIL is the equivalent official MOLIT-operated mirror.
